scripts.dev: concurrently -n fe,be -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace=frontend" "npm run dev --workspace=backend"
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=frontend && npm run lint --workspace=backend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build --workspace=backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=frontend && npm run typecheck --workspace=backend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=frontend && npm run test --workspace=backend
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --workspace=frontend && npm run test:coverage --workspace=backend
scripts.playground: concurrently -n plantuml,mermaid -c magenta,cyan "npm run playground --workspace=@drawhaus/plantuml-to-excalidraw" "npm run playground --workspace=@drawhaus/mermaid-to-excalidraw"
